package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_sync_pool_stores_large_unbounded_buffers: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag sync.Pool usage that stores large buffers without a cap before putting them back.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule542PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario542Positive(records []Rule542PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
